config.penaltyFormula: ((ingredient1.meta.craftElement ~= ingredient2.meta.craftElement and ingredient1.meta.craftElement ~= '' and ingredient2.meta.craftElement ~= '') and 15 or 0) + (S < (ingredient1.meta.tier + ingredient2.meta.tier) * 6 and 20 or 0)

scripts.calcYield:
-- Yield / pool / roulette computation for the Item Creation extra scene.
-- Faithful port of the former engine handler; runs in the SCRIPT sandbox.
local v = ctx.v
local config = ctx.config or {}
local disc = (config.disciplines or {})[v.selectedDisciplineIdx or 1]
if not disc then return end
local discKind = disc.kind or ""

-- Inventory, ordered exactly as the window renderer's priority sort:
-- discipline-matching items first, id ascending within each group.
local inv = api.items()
table.sort(inv, function(a, b)
    local aKind = a.meta and a.meta.craftKind or ""
    local bKind = b.meta and b.meta.craftKind or ""
    if aKind == discKind and bKind ~= discKind then return true
    elseif aKind ~= discKind and bKind == discKind then return false
    else return a.id < b.id end
end)
v.invCount = #inv
local party = api.party()
v.partyCount = #party

local i1 = inv[v.selectedIngredient1Idx]
local i2 = inv[v.selectedIngredient2Idx]
v.i1_item_id = i1 and i1.id or 0
v.i2_item_id = i2 and i2.id or 0
if v.i1_item_id == 0 or v.i2_item_id == 0 then
    v.yieldScore = 0
    v.yieldAnomalyScore = 0
    v.isAnomaly = false
    return
end

local crafter = party[v.crafterIdx or 1]
if not crafter then return end
local statName = disc.stat or "atk"
local S = (statName == "level") and crafter.level or crafter[statName]

local env = { i1 = i1, i2 = i2, ingredient1 = i1, ingredient2 = i2,
    crafter = crafter, alpha = config.alpha or 0.5, S = S }
local Y = math.floor(tonumber(api.eval(config.yieldFormula or "0", env)) or 0)
local penalty = math.floor(tonumber(api.eval(config.penaltyFormula or "0", env)) or 0)
local Y_final = math.max(0, Y - penalty)
local anomalyMult = tonumber(api.eval(config.anomalyFormula or "1.0", env)) or 1.0
local isCrit = (anomalyMult > 1.0)
local Y_anomaly = math.floor(Y_final * anomalyMult)

-- Outcome tier: name from the pre-anomaly bracket, pool tier from the final score
local brackets = config.brackets or {}
local tier, tierName = 0, "Junk"
for _, br in ipairs(brackets) do
    if Y_final <= br.max then tier = br.tier; tierName = br.name; break end
end
if tier == 0 and Y_final > 0 then
    local lastBr = brackets[#brackets]
    if lastBr and Y_final > lastBr.max then tier = lastBr.tier; tierName = lastBr.name end
end
local finalScore = isCrit and Y_anomaly or Y_final
local outcomeTier = 0
for _, br in ipairs(brackets) do
    if finalScore <= br.max then outcomeTier = br.tier; break end
end
if outcomeTier == 0 and finalScore > 0 then
    local lastBr = brackets[#brackets]
    if lastBr then outcomeTier = lastBr.tier end
end

-- Roulette pool from the full item database; fall back to tier-0 items
local pool = {}
for _, item in ipairs(api.allItems()) do
    if item.meta and item.meta.craftKind == discKind and item.meta.tier == outcomeTier then
        table.insert(pool, item)
    end
end
if #pool == 0 then
    for _, item in ipairs(api.allItems()) do
        if item.meta and item.meta.craftKind == discKind and item.meta.tier == 0 then
            table.insert(pool, item)
        end
    end
end

v.yieldScore = Y_final
v.yieldAnomalyScore = Y_anomaly
v.penaltyValue = penalty
v.isAnomaly = isCrit
v.outcomeTier = outcomeTier
v.outcomeTierName = tierName
v.i1Name = i1.name or ""
v.i2Name = i2.name or ""
v.crafterName = crafter.name or ""
v.elementConflict = (i1.meta and i2.meta
    and i1.meta.craftElement and i2.meta.craftElement
    and i1.meta.craftElement ~= "" and i2.meta.craftElement ~= ""
    and i1.meta.craftElement ~= i2.meta.craftElement) and true or false

v.poolTargetIdx = v.poolTargetIdx or 0
if #pool > 0 then
    v.poolSize = #pool
    if v.poolTargetIdx == 0 then v.poolTargetIdx = random(#pool) end
    v.poolCurrentIdx = random(#pool)
    local targetItem = pool[v.poolTargetIdx]
    v.resultItemId = targetItem and targetItem.id or 0
    v.resultItemName = targetItem and targetItem.name or ""
    v.pool = {}
    for _, pitem in ipairs(pool) do
        table.insert(v.pool, { name = pitem.name or "", icon = pitem.icon or 0 })
    end
else
    v.poolSize = 0
    v.poolCurrentIdx = 0
    v.resultItemId = 0
    v.resultItemName = ""
    v.pool = {}
end

-- Roulette completion (state 5): consume ingredients, grant the result
if v.state == 5 then
    local timing = config.timing or {}
    local steps = timing.steps or 200
    v.rouletteStep = (v.rouletteStep or 0) + 1
    if v.rouletteStep >= steps then
        if v.i1_item_id ~= 0 then api.takeItem(v.i1_item_id, 1) end
        if v.i2_item_id ~= 0 then api.takeItem(v.i2_item_id, 1) end
        local resultItem = pool[v.poolTargetIdx or 1]
        if resultItem then api.giveItem(resultItem.id, 1) end
        api.emit({ type = "text", text = "Crafted " .. (v.resultItemName or "") .. "!" })
        v.state = 6
        v.rouletteStep = 0
    else
        local delay = v.rouletteDelay or timing.initialDelay or 0.05
        v.rouletteDelay = math.min(delay * (timing.delayMult or 1.25), timing.maxDelay or 10)
    end
end

on_select.condition: v._guard == 0 and v.mode == 1 and v.cmdIdx == 2 and party.count > 0

scripts.selectPartyMember:
local v = ctx.v
local member = api.party(v.partyIdx)
if member then
    v._guard = 1
    v.mode = 2
    v.memberIdx = v.partyIdx
    v.popupIdx = 1
    api.emit({ type = "open_window", windowId = "map_member_popup" })
    api.emit({ type = "set_list", windowId = "map_member_popup", listId = "config:unitCommands" })
    api.emit({ type = "set_cursor", windowId = "map_member_popup", index = v.popupIdx })
end

UP/DOWN: select member    LEFT/RIGHT: page    ENTER: equip    ESC: back

scripts.handleInput:
local v = ctx.v
local b = v.battle
local memberInfo = (v.livingMembers or {})[v.activeMemberIdx or 1]
if not memberInfo then
    v.combatState = "log"
    return
end

if v.targetSelect then
    local targeting = api.targeting
    local candidates = targeting.getCandidates(memberInfo.actor, v.pendingAction.targetSpec, b)
    if v.action == "up" or v.action == "left" then
        if #candidates > 0 then v.targetIndex = (v.targetIndex - 2) % #candidates + 1 end
    elseif v.action == "down" or v.action == "right" then
        if #candidates > 0 then v.targetIndex = v.targetIndex % #candidates + 1 end
    elseif v.action == "cancel" then
        v.targetSelect = false
        v.selectedIndex = v.prevSelectedIndex or 1
    elseif v.action == "select" then
        if #candidates > 0 then
            local chosenTarget = candidates[v.targetIndex]
            v.targetSelect = false
            api.battle.commitAction(memberInfo.index, { type = v.pendingAction.type, id = v.pendingAction.id, itemIndex = v.pendingAction.itemIndex, target = chosenTarget })
        end
    end
    return
end

if v.skillSelect then
    local options = {}
    for _, skId in ipairs(memberInfo.actor.skills or {}) do
        local sk = api.getSkill(skId)
        if sk then table.insert(options, sk) end
    end

    if v.action == "up" then
        if #options > 0 then v.selectedIndex = (v.selectedIndex - 2) % #options + 1 end
    elseif v.action == "down" then
        if #options > 0 then v.selectedIndex = v.selectedIndex % #options + 1 end
    elseif v.action == "cancel" then
        v.skillSelect = false
        v.selectedIndex = 2
    elseif v.action == "select" then
        local choice = options[v.selectedIndex]
        if choice then
            api.battle.startTargetSelection({ type = "skill", id = choice.id })
        end
    end
elseif v.itemSelect then
    local items = api.items()
    if v.action == "up" then
        if #items > 0 then v.selectedIndex = (v.selectedIndex - 2) % #items + 1 end
    elseif v.action == "down" then
        if #items > 0 then v.selectedIndex = v.selectedIndex % #items + 1 end
    elseif v.action == "cancel" then
        v.itemSelect = false
        v.selectedIndex = 4
    elseif v.action == "select" then
        local choice = items[v.selectedIndex]
        if choice then
            api.battle.startTargetSelection({ type = "item", itemIndex = v.selectedIndex })
        end
    end
else
    if v.action == "left" or v.action == "up" then
        v.selectedIndex = (v.selectedIndex - 2) % 5 + 1
    elseif v.action == "right" or v.action == "down" then
        v.selectedIndex = v.selectedIndex % 5 + 1
    elseif v.action == "cancel" then
        api.battle.undoAction()
    elseif v.action == "select" then
        if v.selectedIndex == 1 then
            api.battle.startTargetSelection({ type = "attack" })
        elseif v.selectedIndex == 2 then
            v.skillSelect = true
            v.selectedIndex = 1
        elseif v.selectedIndex == 3 then
            api.battle.commitAction(memberInfo.index, { type = "defend" })
        elseif v.selectedIndex == 4 then
            v.itemSelect = true
            v.selectedIndex = 1
        elseif v.selectedIndex == 5 then
            api.battle.commitAction(memberInfo.index, { type = "flee" })
        end
    end
end
scripts.handleLogInput:
local v = ctx.v
if v.action == "select" then
    if api.battle.isLogRevealing() then
        api.battle.finishLogReveal()
        v.hookHandled = true
    elseif api.battle.isAnimationPlaying() then
        v.hookHandled = true
    elseif v.eventQueueIndex <= #(v.eventsQueue or {}) then
        api.battle.advanceLog()
        v.hookHandled = true
    else
        v.hookHandled = false
    end
else
    v.hookHandled = false
end
scripts.handleTransition:
local v = ctx.v
if v.action ~= "select" or not v.battle then 
    v.hookHandled = false
    return 
end
v.hookHandled = api.battle.handleTransition(v.action)
scripts.refreshConsole:
local v = ctx.v
local memberInfo = (v.livingMembers or {})[v.activeMemberIdx or 1]
local monster = memberInfo and memberInfo.actor
local rows, helps = {}, {}
if v.skillSelect then
    for _, skId in ipairs((monster and monster.skills) or {}) do
        local sk = api.getSkill(skId)
        if sk then
            table.insert(rows, { name = sk.name })
            table.insert(helps, sk.description or "")
        end
    end
    if #rows == 0 then table.insert(rows, { name = "(No skills)" }) end
elseif v.itemSelect then
    for _, it in ipairs(api.items()) do
        local full = api.getItem(it.id)
        table.insert(rows, { name = (it.name or "?") .. " x" .. tostring(it.qty) })
        table.insert(helps, (full and full.description) or "")
    end
    if #rows == 0 then table.insert(rows, { name = "(No items)" }) end
else
    local labels = api.getTermList("battle.commands_monster", { "Attack", "Skill", "Defend", "Item", "Flee" })
    local helpLabels = api.getTermList("battle.help_monster", {
        "Strike with a basic attack.",
        "Use one of this creature's skills.",
        "Brace to reduce incoming damage.",
        "Use an item from the inventory.",
        "Attempt to escape the battle.",
    })
    for i, label in ipairs(labels) do
        table.insert(rows, { name = label })
        helps[i] = helpLabels[i] or ""
    end
end
v.commandRows = rows
v.currentHelpText = helps[v.selectedIndex] or ""

on_select.condition: v.count > 0 and v.items[v.idx] and session.gold >= v.items[v.idx].cost

terms.title: Reserve Roster
terms.help: Select a slot to swap, summon, or sacrifice.  Arrows: move  ESC: back

then.name: popupIdx
then.value: v.popupIdx < v.popupCount and v.popupIdx + 1 or v.popupIdx

scripts.setupReservePopup:
local v = ctx.v
local focusArea = v.focusArea
local cursorIdx = v.cursorIdx
local member = (focusArea == 'party') and api.party(cursorIdx) or api.reserve(cursorIdx)
local options = {}

if member and member.empty then
    member = nil
end

v.popupTargetIsReserve = (focusArea == 'reserve')
v.popupTargetIndex = cursorIdx
v.popupMemberName = member and (member.name or "Unknown") or nil
v.popupMemberRef = member

if member then
    table.insert(options, {name = "Swap"})
    table.insert(options, {name = "Sacrifice"})
    if api.canPromote(v.popupTargetIsReserve, v.popupTargetIndex) then
        table.insert(options, {name = "Promote"})
    end
else
    table.insert(options, {name = "Summon"})
    table.insert(options, {name = "Swap"})
end
table.insert(options, {name = "Cancel"})

v.popupCount = #options
v.popupOptions = options
scripts.executeReservePopup:
local v = ctx.v
local opt = v.popupOptions[v.popupIdx].name
if opt == "Cancel" then
    v.mode = 1
    api.emit({ type = "close_window", windowId = "reserve_popup" })
elseif opt == "Swap" then
    v.mode = 4
    v.swapSourceIsReserve = v.popupTargetIsReserve
    v.swapSourceIndex = v.popupTargetIndex
    v.swapSourceFocus = v.focusArea
    api.emit({ type = "close_window", windowId = "reserve_popup" })
    api.emit({ type = "set_text", windowId = "reserve_help", text = "Select a target to swap with.  ESC: cancel" })
elseif opt == "Sacrifice" then
    v.ritualPush = "sacrifice"
    v.mode = 1
    api.emit({ type = "close_window", windowId = "reserve_popup" })
elseif opt == "Promote" then
    v.ritualPush = "promote"
    v.mode = 1
    api.emit({ type = "close_window", windowId = "reserve_popup" })
elseif opt == "Summon" then
    v.ritualPush = "summon"
    v.mode = 1
    api.emit({ type = "close_window", windowId = "reserve_popup" })
end
scripts.executeSwap:
local v = ctx.v
api.swap(v.swapSourceIndex, v.swapSourceIsReserve, v.cursorIdx, v.focusArea == 'reserve')
if api.partyCount() <= 0 then
    api.swap(v.cursorIdx, v.focusArea == 'reserve', v.swapSourceIndex, v.swapSourceIsReserve)
    api.emit({ type = "set_text", windowId = "reserve_help", text = "Cannot leave the party empty!" })
    v.mode = 1
    return
end
v.mode = 1
api.emit({ type = "set_text", windowId = "reserve_help", text = "{config.terms.help}" })

content.cursor: (v.mode == 1 or v.mode == 4) and v.focusArea == 'party' and v.cursorIdx or 0
(v.mode == 1 or v.mode == 4) and v.focusArea == 'reserve' and v.cursorIdx or 0

config.note: Legacy-drawn (renderer.drawTown). Entries come from system.town.options. Currently unreachable in-game; kept as a placeholder for a future VN-style hub scene.

Windows-drawn. Reached via scene_host.goto_scene("dialogue") from map step/interact events and CALL_COMMON_EVENT chains. main.lua's handleKeyPressed dialogue branch drives GraphWalker advance/selectChoice directly (unchanged); a per-frame sync in love.update mirrors the active node into v.dialogue* fields these windows bind to, docked over the same footprint the party HUD uses elsewhere so dialogue doesn't take over the whole screen.
Shared summon/promote/sacrifice scene. Pushed with vars: ritualMode ('summon'|'promote'|'sacrifice'), targetIsReserve, targetIndex. Page 1 = stats/costs, page 2 = portrait/flavor (Q/E/Tab).

scripts.setupRitual:
local v = ctx.v
v._guard = 1
v.state = 1
v.page = 1
v.confirmIdx = 1
v.confirmOptions = { {name = "Yes"}, {name = "No"} }
if v.ritualMode == nil then v.ritualMode = "summon" end
if v.targetIsReserve == nil then v.targetIsReserve = true end
v.targetIndex = v.targetIndex or 1

local function actorEntry(id)
    local pv = api.actorPreview(id)
    local ad = pv and pv.actorData or {}
    return {
        id = id,
        name = pv and pv.name or "?",
        level = ad.level or 1,
        tier = ad.tier or 1,
        spriteKey = ad.smallBattler or ad.spriteKey or "",
        portraitKey = ad.spriteKey or "",
        flavor = ad.flavor or "",
    }
end

if v.ritualMode == "summon" then
    local pool = {}
    for _, actor in ipairs(api.allActors()) do
        if actor.unlocked then table.insert(pool, actorEntry(actor.id)) end
    end
    v.pool = pool
    v.poolIdx = 1
    v._lastPoolIdx = 0
else
    local member = v.targetIsReserve and api.reserve(v.targetIndex) or api.party(v.targetIndex)
    if member and member.empty then member = nil end
    v.memberName = member and member.name or "?"
end
if v.ritualMode == "promote" then
    local member = v.targetIsReserve and api.reserve(v.targetIndex) or api.party(v.targetIndex)
    local paths = {}
    if member and not member.empty then
        for _, e in ipairs((member.actorData and member.actorData.evolutions) or {}) do
            if e.level and member.level >= e.level and e.evolvesTo then
                table.insert(paths, e.evolvesTo)
            end
        end
    end
    v.evoPaths = paths
    v.evoIdx = 1
end
scripts.refreshRitual:
local v = ctx.v
local sm = api.systemConfig.summoner or {}
local function statWide(p)
    return "HP " .. p.maxHp .. "  ATK " .. p.atk .. "  DEF " .. p.def .. "\nMAT " .. p.mat .. "  MDF " .. p.mdf .. "  ASP " .. p.asp
end
local function statTall(p)
    return "HP  " .. p.maxHp .. "\nATK " .. p.atk .. "\nDEF " .. p.def .. "\nMAT " .. p.mat .. "\nMDF " .. p.mdf .. "\nASP " .. p.asp
end
local function memberSprite(m)
    local ad = m.actorData or {}
    return ad.smallBattler or ad.spriteKey or ""
end

if v.ritualMode == "summon" then
    local entry = v.pool[v.poolIdx]
    if not entry then return end
    if v.poolIdx ~= v._lastPoolIdx then
        v.baseLevel = entry.level
        v.level = entry.level
        v._lastPoolIdx = v.poolIdx
    end
    local pv = api.actorPreview(entry.id, v.level)
    local skills = {}
    for _, s in ipairs(pv.skillList or {}) do table.insert(skills, s.name) end
    v.subjectRow = { { name = entry.name, spriteKey = entry.spriteKey,
        text = entry.name .. "  Lv " .. v.level .. "  (Tier " .. entry.tier .. ")" } }
    v.statText = statWide(pv) .. "\n\nSkills: " .. table.concat(skills, ", ")
    v.mpCost = (sm.summonCostBase or 10) + entry.tier * (sm.summonCostPerTier or 15) + v.level * (sm.summonCostPerLevel or 5)
    v.expCost = api.summonExpCost(entry.id, v.level)
    v.costText = "MP " .. v.mpCost .. "/" .. api.getMp() .. "   EXP " .. v.expCost .. " (Bank " .. api.getExpBank() .. ")\nENTER: summon   ESC: back"
    v.portraitKey = entry.portraitKey
    v.flavorText = entry.name .. "\n\n" .. (entry.flavor or "")
    v.titleText = "SUMMON   E: art   L/R: level   U/D: pick"
elseif v.ritualMode == "promote" then
    local member = v.targetIsReserve and api.reserve(v.targetIndex) or api.party(v.targetIndex)
    if not member or member.empty then
        v.sideText = "No creature."
        v.titleText = "PROMOTE"
        v.costText = "ESC: back"
        return
    end
    local evoId = v.evoPaths and v.evoPaths[v.evoIdx]
    v.sideText = "Choose an\nevolution\npath for\n" .. member.name .. "."
        .. (#(v.evoPaths or {}) > 1 and "\n\nL/R: path" or "")
    if evoId then
        local pv = api.actorPreview(evoId, member.level)
        v.fromRow = { { name = member.name, spriteKey = memberSprite(member), text = member.name } }
        v.toRow = { { name = pv.name, spriteKey = (pv.actorData.smallBattler or pv.actorData.spriteKey or ""), text = pv.name } }
        v.fromStat = "Lv " .. member.level .. "\n" .. statTall(member)
        v.toStat = "Lv " .. member.level .. "\n" .. statTall(pv)
        local ok, costText = api.promoteInfo(v.targetIsReserve, v.targetIndex, v.evoIdx)
        v.costText = "Cost:" .. (costText ~= "" and costText or " (free)") .. "\nENTER: promote   ESC: back"
        v.portraitKey = pv.actorData.spriteKey or ""
        v.flavorText = pv.name .. "\n\n" .. (pv.actorData.flavor or "")
        v.titleText = "PROMOTE   E: art   Path " .. v.evoIdx .. "/" .. #v.evoPaths
    else
        v.fromRow = { { name = member.name, spriteKey = memberSprite(member), text = member.name } }
        v.toRow = { { name = "?", text = "--none--" } }
        v.fromStat = "Lv " .. member.level .. "\n" .. statTall(member)
        v.toStat = "No available\npromotion."
        v.costText = "ESC: back"
        v.portraitKey = (member.actorData or {}).spriteKey or ""
        v.flavorText = ""
        v.titleText = "PROMOTE"
    end
else
    local member = v.targetIsReserve and api.reserve(v.targetIndex) or api.party(v.targetIndex)
    local p = api.sacrificePreview(v.targetIsReserve, v.targetIndex)
    v.titleText = "SACRIFICE   E: art"
    if not p or not member or member.empty then
        v.sideText = "No creature."
        v.costText = "ESC: back"
        return
    end
    v.sideText = "Sacrifice\n" .. member.name .. " to\nbank its EXP\nand receive\nmaterials."
    v.subjectRow = { { name = member.name, spriteKey = memberSprite(member),
        text = member.name .. "  Lv " .. member.level } }
    local lines = { "EXP Yield: " .. p.exp .. "   (Bank: " .. api.getExpBank() .. ")" }
    for _, r in ipairs(p.rewards or {}) do
        table.insert(lines, r.name .. " x" .. r.count .. "  (" .. math.floor((r.chance or 1) * 100) .. "%)")
    end
    v.statText = statWide(member) .. "\n\n" .. table.concat(lines, "\n")
    v.costText = "ENTER sacrifice  ESC back"
    v.portraitKey = (member.actorData or {}).spriteKey or ""
    v.flavorText = member.name .. "\n\n" .. ((member.actorData or {}).flavor or "")
end
scripts.stepLevel:
local v = ctx.v
if v.ritualMode ~= "summon" or v.state ~= 1 then return end
local entry = v.pool and v.pool[v.poolIdx]
if not entry then return end
local dir = v._stepDir or 0
local newLevel = (v.level or 1) + dir
if newLevel < (v.baseLevel or 1) then newLevel = v.baseLevel or 1 end
if newLevel > 99 then newLevel = 99 end
if dir > 0 and api.summonExpCost(entry.id, newLevel) > api.getExpBank() then
    return
end
v.level = newLevel
scripts.confirmRitual:
local v = ctx.v
v._guard = 1
if v.ritualMode == "summon" then
    local entry = v.pool[v.poolIdx]
    local target = v.targetIsReserve and api.reserve(v.targetIndex) or api.party(v.targetIndex)
    if target and not target.empty then
        v.resultText = "That slot is occupied!"
        v.state = 1
    elseif api.getMp() < (v.mpCost or 0) then
        v.resultText = "Not enough MP!"
        v.state = 1
    elseif api.getExpBank() < (v.expCost or 0) then
        v.resultText = "Not enough banked EXP!"
        v.state = 1
    else
        api.changeMp(-(v.mpCost or 0))
        api.changeExpBank(-(v.expCost or 0))
        api.summon(entry.id, v.targetIsReserve, v.targetIndex, v.level)
        v.resultText = "Summoned " .. entry.name .. "\nat Lv " .. tostring(v.level) .. "!"
        v.state = 3
    end
elseif v.ritualMode == "promote" then
    local ok = api.promote(v.targetIsReserve, v.targetIndex, v.evoIdx)
    if ok then
        v.resultText = tostring(v.memberName) .. " evolved\ninto a stronger form!"
        v.state = 3
    else
        v.resultText = "Promotion failed\n(cost not met)."
        v.state = 1
    end
else
    if not v.targetIsReserve and api.partyCount() <= 1 then
        v.resultText = "Cannot sacrifice your\nlast creature!"
        v.state = 1
    else
        local r = api.executeSacrifice(v.targetIsReserve, v.targetIndex)
        if r then
            local txt = "Sacrificed " .. r.name .. "!\n+" .. r.exp .. " EXP banked."
            for _, it in ipairs(r.items or {}) do
                txt = txt .. "\nGot " .. it.name .. " x" .. it.count .. "!"
            end
            v.resultText = txt
            v.state = 3
        else
            v.resultText = "Nothing to sacrifice."
            v.state = 1
        end
    end
end
if v.state == 1 then
    v.costText = v.resultText:gsub("\n", " ") .. "   ESC: back"
end

on_up.condition: v._guard == 0 and v.state == 1 and v.ritualMode == 'summon' and v.poolIdx > 1

on_down.condition: v._guard == 0 and v.state == 1 and v.ritualMode == 'summon' and v.poolIdx < #v.pool

on_left.condition: v._guard == 0 and v.state == 1 and v.ritualMode == 'promote' and #v.evoPaths > 1

on_right.condition: v._guard == 0 and v.state == 1 and v.ritualMode == 'promote' and #v.evoPaths > 1
